title: Auto Get (request)
description: Retrieve details for a specific automated trading run, with optional subscription to real-time updates

subscribe.description: [Optional] If set to `1`, will stream run updates (new contracts purchased, status changes) until the run ends or `forget` is called.

passthrough.description: [Optional] Used to pass data through the websocket, which may be retrieved via the `echo_req` output field.

req_id.description: [Optional] Used to map request to response.
